stemHtml: An aircraft is set to depart in the Northern Hemisphere from an airfield situated on flat terrain, far from any coastline or mountainous areas, at 11:00 local time. Flight planning is based on an ATIS report indicating wind from 060° at 8 knots, with the planned departure from Runway 08. However, due to airspace congestion, departure is delayed by 2 hours. How will the headwind component and wind speed be affected by this delay?
